tasks.label: Smart toggle CSS / TSX
tasks.command: FILE="${file}"; BASE="${fileDirname}/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"; case "$FILE" in *.tsx) TARGET="$BASE.css"; [ -f "$TARGET" ] || touch "$TARGET" ;; *.css) TARGET="$BASE.tsx" ;; *) TARGET="$BASE.css"; [ -f "$TARGET" ] || touch "$TARGET" ;; esac; code -r "$TARGET"
